final:
module morphological_erosion (
    input  [8:0] binary_matrix,  // 3x3 binary image flattened (9 bits)
    output reg       eroded_pixel // Output pixel after erosion
);
    always @(*) begin
        // Erosion with a structuring element
        if (binary_matrix[0] && binary_matrix[1] && binary_matrix[2] &&
            binary_matrix[3] && binary_matrix[4] && binary_matrix[5] &&
            binary_matrix[6] && binary_matrix[7] && binary_matrix[8]) begin
            eroded_pixel = 1'b1; // Erosion successful
        end else begin
            eroded_pixel = 1'b0; // Erosion not successful
        end
    end
endmodule
